mapper.select: SELECT LOWER(a.column_name) AS board_column, a.comments AS board_column_nm, NVL(DECODE(b.data_type,'DATE',b.data_type,'VARCHAR2',b.data_type||'('||b.data_length||')', 'NUMBER',DECODE(b.data_scale,0, b.data_type||'('||b.data_precision||')', b.data_type||'('||b.data_precision||','||b.data_scale||')')),'CLOB') AS type, DECODE(c.position,NULL,DECODE(b.nullable,'N','NN',''),'PK') AS constraints FROM USER_COL_COMMENTS a, USER_TAB_COLUMNS b, ( SELECT table_name, column_name, position FROM USER_CONS_COLUMNS WHERE position IS NOT NULL ) c WHERE a.table_name = b.table_name(+) AND a.column_name = b.column_name(+) AND a.table_name = c.table_name(+) AND a.column_name = c.column_name(+) AND a.table_name = 'CMS_BOARD' AND a.column_name NOT IN ( 'MANAGE_IDX', 'BOARD_IDX', 'GROUP_IDX', 'PARENT_IDX', 'GROUP_DEPTH', 'DELETE_ID', 'DEL_DTTM','MODIFY_ID', 'UPD_DTTM2', 'USER_EMAIL_RECEIVE_YN', 'USER_SMS_RECEIVE_YN', 'NOTICE_YN', 'SECRET_YN', 'NOTICE_START_DATE', 'NOTICE_END_DATE', 'USER_PASSWD', 'FILE_COUNT', 'FILE_DOWNLOAD_COUNT' ) ORDER BY b.column_id

SELECT manage_idx, board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, NVL(content_link_yn, 'N') AS content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, NVL(list_use_yn, 'N') AS list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, NVL(write_use_yn, 'N') AS write_use_yn, write_seq, NVL(write_req_cont, 'N') AS write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, NVL(search_use_yn, 'N') AS search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx}

SELECT manage_idx, LOWER(board_column) AS board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, NVL(content_link_yn, 'N') AS content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, NVL(list_use_yn, 'N') AS list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, NVL(write_use_yn, 'N') AS write_use_yn, write_seq, NVL(write_req_cont, 'N') AS write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, NVL(search_use_yn, 'N') AS search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND list_use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY list_seq ASC

SELECT manage_idx, LOWER(board_column) AS board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, NVL(content_link_yn, 'N') AS content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, NVL(list_use_yn, 'N') AS list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, NVL(write_use_yn, 'N') AS write_use_yn, write_seq, NVL(write_req_cont, 'N') AS write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, NVL(search_use_yn, 'N') AS search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND NVL(admin_only, 'N') != 'Y' AND board_column NOT IN ( 'add_id', 'user_name', 'add_date' ) ORDER BY write_seq ASC

SELECT manage_idx, LOWER(board_column) AS board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, NVL(content_link_yn, 'N') AS content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, NVL(list_use_yn, 'N') AS list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, NVL(write_use_yn, 'N') AS write_use_yn, write_seq, NVL(write_req_cont, 'N') AS write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, NVL(search_use_yn, 'N') AS search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND NVL(admin_only, 'N') = 'Y' AND board_column NOT IN ( 'add_id', 'user_name', 'add_date' ) ORDER BY write_seq ASC

SELECT manage_idx, LOWER(board_column) AS board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, NVL(content_link_yn, 'N') AS content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, NVL(list_use_yn, 'N') AS list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, NVL(write_use_yn, 'N') AS write_use_yn, write_seq, NVL(write_req_cont, 'N') AS write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, NVL(search_use_yn, 'N') AS search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_column NOT IN('crt_id', 'add_date', 'user_name') ORDER BY list_seq ASC

SELECT manage_idx, board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, write_use_yn, write_seq, write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_column = #{board_column}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE ( manage_idx, board_column, board_column_nm, board_content, content_link_yn, column_type, code_mapping, list_use_yn, list_seq, list_width, list_maxwidth, write_use_yn, write_seq, write_req_cont, write_width, write_height, search_use_yn, search_seq, upd_id, upd_dttm, crt_id, crt_dttm, admin_only ) VALUES ( #{manage_idx}, #{board_column}, #{board_column_nm}, #{board_content}, #{content_link_yn}, #{column_type}, #{code_mapping}, #{list_use_yn}, #{list_seq}, #{ list_width}, #{list_maxwidth}, #{write_use_yn}, #{write_seq}, #{write_req_cont}, #{write_width}, #{write_height}, #{search_use_yn}, #{search_seq}, #{upd_id}, #{upd_dttm}, #{crt_id}, #{crt_dttm}, #{admin_only} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE SET board_column = #{board_column}, board_column_nm = #{board_column_nm}, board_content = #{board_content}, content_link_yn = #{content_link_yn}, column_type = #{column_type}, code_mapping = #{code_mapping}, list_use_yn = #{list_use_yn}, list_seq = #{list_seq}, list_width = #{list_width}, list_maxwidth = #{list_maxwidth}, write_use_yn = #{write_use_yn}, write_seq = #{write_seq}, write_req_cont = #{write_req_cont}, write_width = #{write_width}, write_height= #{write_height}, search_use_yn = #{search_use_yn}, search_seq = #{search_seq}, upd_id = #{upd_id}, upd_dttm = SYSDATE, admin_only = #{admin_only} WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_column = #{board_column}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_BOARD_FIELD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND board_column = #{board_column}
